Label: N/A
Issue: The document does not specify the total number of supported concurrent users.
Suggestion: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 1.2
Issue: The document does not specify the data formats for the telemetry data and IDFS data sets.
Suggestion: Specify the data formats for telemetry data and IDFS data sets in the Data System Overview section.

Label: Section 2.2
Issue: The qualification methods do not include 'Inspection' and 'Test' as possible methods.
Suggestion: Include 'Inspection' and 'Test' as qualification methods to cover all possible verification scenarios.

Label: Section 3.1
Issue: The functional requirements do not specify error handling for data processing failures.
Suggestion: Include a requirement that specifies how the system should handle data processing failures, such as logging errors and retry mechanisms.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: The requirement does not specify the frequency of updates for the web-based displays.
Suggestion: Specify that the web-based displays shall be updated at least every 24 hours.

Label: APAF-FR-08
Issue: The requirement does not specify the types of data that can be used for science analysis.
Suggestion: Specify the types of data (e.g., raw, processed, intermediate) that can be used for science analysis in the web-based displays.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: The requirement does not specify the encryption standards for password protection.
Suggestion: Specify the encryption standards (e.g., AES-256) to be used for password protection on the web server.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: The requirement does not specify the storage capacity of the archival system.
Suggestion: Specify the minimum storage capacity required for the archival system.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: The requirement does not specify the actions to be taken if the transmission and processing are not error-free.
Suggestion: Specify the actions to be taken, such as retry mechanisms or alerting the system administrator, if the transmission and processing are not error-free.

Label: APAF-DR-07
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format and medium for data distribution to Co-I's.
Suggestion: Specify the format (e.g., CSV, JSON) and medium (e.g., email, FTP) for data distribution to Co-I's.

Label: Section 3.9.4
Issue: The document states that there are no requirements concerned with software quality, which is incomplete.
Suggestion: Include specific software quality requirements such as reliability, maintainability, and usability.

Label: Section 3.9.6
Issue: The document does not specify the personnel-related requirements for system operators.
Suggestion: Include requirements related to the qualifications and training of personnel who will operate the APAF system.

Label: Section 3.9.7
Issue: The document does not specify the training-related requirements for users and operators.
Suggestion: Include training-related requirements such as mandatory training sessions and certification for users and operators.
